ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(OR($Profile.Name='CFG - Distressed Collection',$Profile.Name='CFG-Distressed ParaLegal Only') , OR( ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'More Info required') ,ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Approved'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Rejected')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot set the status to More info required, Approved and Rejected.
